text_block_list.text:
I'm shopping at the mall with Seiun Sky and Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Grass! I found the incense.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you. They've got quite a lot here.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I wonder which one will help with insomnia...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Incense that helps you catch some Zs, huh? I
don't think I'd need much help with that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Only takes me about three seconds to find my
way to dreamland, whenever or wherever.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the way you always keep your composure is
commendable.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... They have electric burners we can test.
Shall we try some out?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let's start with sandalwood.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes... It has a lovely, soothing fragrance.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sei? Can you hear me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Was I snoozing just now?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, well... How interesting.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let's try lavender next. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Um... Grass, wait a sec—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mmm...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nya-ha-ha... Fouuund you, Grass... Now it's my turn... to hide... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Look at that. Perhaps she's playing hide and seek
in a lavender field.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now, what happens when I try lemon?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Grass... Cut it out... You can't eat... a whole
lemon in one... whoa...
choice_data_list: That's quite a dream she's having.
That's quite a dream she's having.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Oh, Sei. You know I'd never do a thing like that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Who knew incense could have this strong of an
effect? ♪ It wouldn't hurt to try out a few more.

Grass Wonder continues testing one stick after
another.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Curry-scented incense? What a rare find! Let's
make this our last one.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... So we're having curry today? Smells
good—huh? You're gonna feed me... with your
eyes closed?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, wait... You have to let it cool... Ack! Hot!
It's too hot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No no no noooo!
choice_data_list: You're okay, it's just a dream.
You're okay, it's just a dream.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wha... a dream?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, it appears the curry scent isn't very
well-suited for sleeping. I've certainly learned a
lot. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Grass... You were just using those last few ones to
mess with me, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, not at all. As if I would do such a thing! I
simply wanted to make an informed decision.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: She was probably messing with you.
She was making an informed decision.
She was making an informed decision.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: She was probably messing with you.
She was making an informed decision.
She was making an informed decision.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I knew it! Grrr, I am capable of getting mad, you know!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I've got a one-way ticket to Snoozetown with
your name on it! Smell thi—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Snooze... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Dear me...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Should we take a picture?

Watching Seiun Sky sabotage herself like that, I
feel as if I've witnessed something never before
seen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. Now, since you apologized for your
mistake, and to repay you for helping me...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you a keychain with a little bag of catnip
attached. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Meow you're talking.

Grass Wonder has Seiun Sky wrapped around her
finger... She's truly fearsome!
